features.name: User Registration & Login
features.evidence: POST /auth/register and POST /auth/login exist (auth.ts). Registration creates user, company, project, and default agent. JWT token set as httpOnly cookie. AuthContext.tsx manages session state. LOGIN currently returns 500 due to DB password issue.
blockers: DATABASE_URL password = '***' causes auth to fail
JWT_SECRET is default dev value
features.recommended_next_step: Fix DATABASE_URL password and regenerate JWT_SECRET

features.name: Company Management
features.evidence: GET/POST /companies (dashboard.ts), CompanyWizard.tsx creates full company with projects/agents. Company settings page exists. But DB connection breaks all queries.
blockers: DATABASE_URL password issue
features.recommended_next_step: Verify company creation flow works after DB fix, test CompanyWizard end-to-end

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.evidence: GET /dashboard/:companyId/stats returns agents count, task counts by status, recent events. No pagination.
blockers: API OOM crash
No indexes on foreign keys degrades performance at scale
features.recommended_next_step: Add pagination, verify stats accuracy with seeded data

features.name: Agent Management
features.evidence: Full CRUD: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /companies/:id/agents. Agent activity logs, skill assignment, heartbeat endpoint (POST /agents/:id/heartbeat). Org chart uses @xyflow/react. No DELETE cascade for dependent records.
blockers: No cascade on delete leaves orphaned agentSkills, agentLogs, executionRuns
Silent skill assignment failures
features.recommended_next_step: Add cascade delete, fix silent skill failures, verify org chart renders with real data

features.name: Org Chart
features.evidence: CompanyOrg.tsx exists, uses @xyflow/react. reportsTo and altReportsTo fields in agents schema. CompanyOrg fetches agents, transforms to React Flow nodes/edges. Cannot verify visual rendering without runtime test.
blockers: Cannot verify visual rendering without working runtime
Depends on reportsTo/altReportsTo being populated
features.recommended_next_step: Runtime verification once DB is fixed

features.name: Task Board & Execution Engine
features.evidence: Full CRUD: GET/POST/PUT /tasks, approval system (POST /tasks/:id/approve), enqueueExecution + dispatcher for Hermes integration, local pattern-matching executor (task-execution.ts). TaskBoard.tsx renders kanban. No DELETE endpoint. retryCount defined but unused.
blockers: Hermes bridge container fails to start
Local executor uses brittle keyword matching
No retry logic despite retryCount column
Missing DELETE endpoint
features.recommended_next_step: Fix hermes-bridge, add DELETE endpoint, implement retry logic

features.name: Task History & Reports
features.evidence: TaskHistory.tsx and ReportsPage.tsx exist. API has GET /history and GET /reports/daily (likely in routes or embedded in dashboard). Cannot confirm route existence without full read.
blockers: Cannot confirm route files exist for history and daily reports
features.recommended_next_step: Verify routes exist, add missing report generation

features.name: Projects
features.evidence: Complete CRUD: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /companies/:id/projects, GET /projects/:id/stats. Proper auth checks on all endpoints. ProjectsPage.tsx matches.
blockers: DELETE has no cascade (orphaned tasks remain)
features.recommended_next_step: Add cascade delete for project -> tasks

features.name: Skills System
features.evidence: Full CRUD: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /skills, agent-skill CRUD via /agents/:id/skills. Skills embedded in AgentsPage.tsx. No dedicated skills page. Silent failures on assignment.
blockers: No skill import/ingestion from files
Silent failures on invalid skillIds
Cannot assign skills without creating them first (no bulk import)
features.recommended_next_step: Add skill import feature, fix silent failure handling

features.name: CEO Autonomous Orchestration
features.evidence: CEOOrchestrator class with 30s tick: context builder, LLM decider, task router, action executor, team assessor, report generator, task monitor. Starts in server.ts:17. Self-executes tasks assigned to CEO agent. But OOM kills entire process at startup.
blockers: API process crashes OOM before orchestrator can run
LLM provider must be configured for reasoning (no fallback when no LLM configured)
orchestrator/llm-decider.ts requires LLM config to make decisions
features.recommended_next_step: Fix OOM crash, add graceful degradation when no LLM provider configured

features.name: Chat / AI Assistant
features.evidence: chatMessages table, GET/POST /chat/messages routes, ChatJournal.tsx page. LLM-based responses supported (uses llm/provider.ts). Cannot verify LLM integration works without configured provider.
blockers: Requires active LLM provider for AI responses
Cannot verify without runtime test
features.recommended_next_step: Configure LLM provider, test chat-to-LLM integration

features.name: Journal
features.evidence: journalEntries table, GET/POST/DELETE /journal route, JournalPage.tsx. Simple CRUD with proper auth checks. No editing (only create/delete).
blockers: Cannot EDIT journal entries (only create and delete)
Auto-creates entry in user's first company, no company selector
features.recommended_next_step: Add PUT /journal/:id for editing

features.name: Calendar
features.evidence: calendarEvents table, GET/POST/PUT /calendar with month filtering. CalendarMeetings.tsx renders events. Agent enrichment via join. No DELETE endpoint.
blockers: Missing DELETE /calendar/:id endpoint
features.recommended_next_step: Add calendar event deletion

features.name: File Hub
features.evidence: files table, GET/POST /files with multipart upload, GET /files/:id/download. 50MB limit, filename sanitization. Local disk storage. FileHub.tsx renders. No virus scanning, no extension whitelist.
blockers: No file type validation
Local-only storage (no cloud backup in Docker)
DELETE endpoint missing
features.recommended_next_step: Add file type validation, DELETE endpoint, and cloud storage option

features.name: LLM Provider Configuration
features.evidence: llmProviders table, GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /llm/providers routes, LLM provider abstraction (OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, local). LLMConfigPage.tsx exists. Test connection endpoint exists. But no LLM provider is active by default.
blockers: No active LLM provider after initial setup (CEO orchestrator cannot reason)
API keys stored in plaintext
Cannot verify test-connection works
features.recommended_next_step: Add 'test connection' validation, require at least one active provider for CEO

features.name: Company Briefs
features.evidence: companyBriefs table, full CRUD on /briefs route. CompanyBriefsPage.tsx with form for vision, market context, constraints, priorities. Proper auth checks.
blockers: Briefs are not used by the CEO orchestrator (context-builder.ts doesn't reference them)
features.recommended_next_step: Wire briefs into CEO orchestrator context building

features.name: Integrations / Connectors
features.evidence: Connector registry pattern (hermes, openclaw), webhook endpoint at /api/connectors/:platform/webhook, OpenClaw discoverAgents/autoConfigure. BUT webhook handler doesn't create events or sync data. It just validates and returns 200.
blockers: Webhook received but no action taken — no events, agents, or tasks created from incoming webhooks
No OpenClaw integration wired upstream
Hermes connector validateWebhook always returns true (no verification)
features.recommended_next_step: Implement webhook event ingestion pipeline, wire OpenClaw agent sync

features.name: Goals
features.evidence: goals table with parentId for hierarchy, full CRUD (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /goals), progress tracking. Proper auth with company scoping.
blockers: Goals are not linked to tasks or agents (informational only)
features.recommended_next_step: Add goal-to-task linking, auto-update progress from task completion

features.name: Hermes Execution Bridge
features.evidence: hermes-bridge.ts loops every 10s polling for 'queued' execution runs. Dispatches to Hermes via webhook. Heroku bridge-loop.sh runs the loop. execution/dispatcher.ts creates run records. BUT Docker container fails with 'Cannot find module /app/bash'.
blockers: Docker entrypoint misconfiguration prevents container startup
HERMES_BRIDGE_URL may resolve to host.docker.internal but Hermes may not be running
Potential duplicate dispatch if poll interval < Hermes processing time
features.recommended_next_step: Fix Docker config, ensure Hermes is running on port 8644, test end-to-end

features.name: Real-time Updates (SSE)
features.evidence: realtime.ts implements Server-Sent Events with EventSource. Pushes updates to clients. But SSE requires persistent HTTP connections — may not work behind Docker Compose with proxy/Vite.
blockers: Cannot verify SSE persistence behind Docker networking
No heartbeat/ping mechanism for connection keepalive
features.recommended_next_step: Test SSE in browser DevTools, add keepalive ping if needed
